response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level junior/mid role. Strong technical match on TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-adjacent skills, but severe seniority mismatch creates high risk of overqualification, salary mismatch, and short tenure. No demonstrated experience in renewable energy or construction tech, and the Berlin location aligns with the on-site requirement which is a plus.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack expertise far exceeding role requirements
Berlin-based, supporting the high on-site presence requirement
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture)
concerns: Severe seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry/junior role
High flight risk and likely salary expectations far above junior band
No PostgreSQL experience listed (MongoDB/MySQL only) and no renewable energy domain exposure
